title: HUME GUSSA KYUN AATA HAI? | HG AMITASANA DAS | GITA LIFE Live
speaker: HG Amitasana Dasa

segments.text: Hare Krishna. A warm welcome to all of you for today's Geeta Live session. We have chosen
a very very important topic, a very practical subject which entails practical application
of some of the teachings of Bhagavad Geeta. Krishna in the Bhagavad Geeta many many places
talks about anger. So in today's discussion we will touch upon these verses to understand
why
we get angry in the first place. What's the root cause of anger? In today's world many
times when people have to solve a problem the first step is root cause analysis. So
we will try to understand in today's session what's the root cause of anger. For that matter
we will relate to whatever leads to anger. All are victims of anger. So
the root cause of anger is anger. All humans are victims of anger. Every one of us get angry
to different degrees in different situations in different circumstances
But the root cause remains the same. What's that? We will understand before we get into
the discussion. Let us start with prayers to Srila Prabhupad, to Lord Chaitanya, Lord
Shri Krishna
